task_completion.description: Run the unit tests with a code coverage tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eclipse IDE showing the context menu or toolbar action 'Coverage As -> JUnit Test' being executed on 'LoanCalculatorTest.java' or the 'FinTechCalc' project.

task_completion.description: Coverage results are successfully generated and displayed in the IDE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Coverage' view/tab in Eclipse is open and populated with coverage statistics for 'FinTechCalc', 'com.fintech.calc', or 'LoanCalculator'.

task_completion.description: Open the coverage report export dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Coverage Report Export' dialog box is open and visible in Eclipse.

task_completion.description: Configure the export format to HTML and set the correct destination path
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the export dialog, the 'HTML report' format is selected, and the destination field is explicitly set to '/home/ga/coverage-report' (or '/home/ga/coverage-report/index.html').

task_completion.description: Verify the HTML report was generated at the target location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or web browser showing the 'index.html' file existing inside the '/home/ga/coverage-report' directory, or displaying the actual HTML coverage report for 'FinTechCalc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse GUI to generate and export the coverage report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Eclipse's EclEmma/Coverage menus and export dialogs, rather than terminal commands generating the report.

integrity.description: The coverage data reflects the actual execution of the project's tests
integrity.visual_evidence: The JUnit view or Coverage view shows 2 tests executed for 'LoanCalculatorTest', and coverage data corresponds to the 'com.fintech.calc' package.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the HTML file to fake the report
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like gedit, nano, or vim) are shown manually writing HTML tags or pasting a pre-made HTML structure into 'index.html'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: FinTechCalc. Target Class: LoanCalculator. Test Class: LoanCalculatorTest. Package: com.fintech.calc. The project has exactly 2 tests. The coverage report must be exported as an HTML file to the exact path: /home/ga/coverage-report/index.html.
